pool.baseline: idk i just stayed up way too late thinking about how nothing actually matters. like, everything we do, all the stress and the working and the trying to be "someone," it's just a blip in a silent universe. it feels so heavy today. like there's just no point to any of it.

pool.baseline: i dont think i can do this anymore. the wound in my side is burning and i can barely feel my legs. every step just feels like more weight i cant carry. it’s too much... everything is just too much. i just want it to stop.

pool.baseline: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i looked at the bills today and i just... i'm just a weight around their necks. if i wasn't here, they could actually breathe again.

pool.baseline: it’s just... everything is gone. the office, the name, the respect. i look in the mirror and i don’t even see a person anymore. just this empty shell of what i used to be. i feel like i died months ago and everyone is just waiting for the body to catch up.

pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet. i never realized how loud the silence would be without him here. everything just feels... empty. like there's no point in even waking up tomorrow.

pool.baseline: i just feel like im playing a game where everyone else has the rulebook and im just guessing. it's so tiring pretending to be a person that actually fits in. i dont think i ever will.

pool.baseline: i feel like i'm just empty. i used to have so much to say, so much color... but now it's just gone. i look at my work and it's all just noise. i think i've finally run out of things to give.

pool.baseline: i feel like im just walking through this thick fog for so long now. the path used to be clear, but lately everything is just grey and heavy. i've reached this edge where the trail just... stops. there's nothing left to walk on, just a long drop into nothingness. it feels like the journey was never meant to go any further.
